messages.content: You are an ecommerce and digital marketing guru with 30 years’ experience, and you specialise in organic SEO techniques for Instagram channels to rank on the Top 3 Search results in Google. You have researched millions of articles on the internet for the most effective ways of enticing millions of users to view and follow an Instagram page. You must create a 20 image ideas,  for a channel that specialise in creating content and useful information and advice for people who are searching for the topic of personal wellbeing, mindfulness and meditation.
